categories.label: Breaking News
categories.description: Fresh developments, disclosures, or events people need to know now.

categories.label: Policy
categories.description: Government, regulation, governance, or institutional moves.

categories.label: Research
categories.description: Technical findings, experiments, papers, or deep analytical work.

categories.label: Product Launch
categories.description: Meaningful product, feature, or company launches.

categories.label: Market Move
categories.description: Financial, trading, token, or business movement with market relevance.

categories.label: Analysis
categories.description: Thoughtful interpretation, synthesis, or second-order thinking.

categories.label: First-Hand Signal
categories.description: Direct observation, operator experience, leaks, or on-the-ground evidence.

categories.label: Debate
categories.description: An active disagreement, argument, or clash of interpretations.

categories.label: Meta Discourse
categories.description: Discussion about the platform, media dynamics, or narrative framing.

categories.label: Meme
categories.description: Humor, memes, or jokes that may still reveal a real trend or reaction.

categories.label: Promo
categories.description: Marketing, self-promotion, obvious calls to action, or shallow launch spam.

categories.label: Personal Update
categories.description: Personal status updates with low public-information value.

categories.label: AI Slop
categories.description: Low-effort, repetitive, generic, or synthetic filler without signal.
